ValidationRule.description: Prevents sales rep from editing the contact details in case the contact sold to / bill to fields are checked
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( $Profile.Name = 'SW Sales Internal', $Profile.Name = 'SW CSM Internal', $Profile.Name = 'SW MIR', $Profile.Name = 'SW SDR', $Profile.Name = 'SW Sales External', $Profile.Name = 'SW Management' ), OR( Bill_To__c = True, Sold_To__c = True ), OR( ISCHANGED(FirstName), ISCHANGED(LastName), ISCHANGED(MailingStreet), ISCHANGED(Phone), ISCHANGED(Email), ISCHANGED(MailingCity), ISCHANGED(MailingPostalCode), ISCHANGED(MailingState), ISCHANGED(MailingCountry) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are trying to edit a sold to / bill to contact information which can be done only by the billing team. Please open a ticket to billing with the changes that you wish to make.
